hero.badge: Introducing Apsara Elearning — every subject, powered by AI
hero.titleKh: រៀនគ្រប់មុខវិជ្ជា
hero.subtitle: The AI-powered learning platform for Cambodian students — from Grade 1 to university. Master Math, Physics, English and more with <mentor>Apsara Elearning</mentor> — your personal AI tutor that speaks Khmer.

math.name: Mathematics
math.question: f(x) = x² − 4x + 3 — what is the minimum value of f(x)?
math.explanation: ✓ Correct! Complete the square: f(x) = (x − 2)² − 1, so the minimum is −1 at x = 2.
math.tutorQ: ហេតុអ្វីតម្លៃអប្បបរមានៅ x = 2?
math.tutorA: Complete the square: <m>f(x) = (x − 2)² − 1</m> — the vertex is at (2, −1), so the minimum is −1. 🎯

physics.name: Physics
physics.question: A ball is dropped from a height of 20 m. How long does it take to reach the ground? (g = 10 m/s²)
physics.tutorQ: ហេតុអ្វី t = 2 s?

chemistry.name: Chemistry
chemistry.question: What is the pH of a 0.01 M HCl solution?
chemistry.tutorQ: ហេតុអ្វី pH = 2?
chemistry.tutorA: HCl is a strong acid, so <m>[H⁺] = 0.01 M</m> and pH = −log(0.01) = 2. 🎯

english.name: English
english.question: Choose the sentence that uses the present perfect correctly:
english.explanation: ✓ Correct! ‘Has lived’ + ‘since’ shows an action continuing from the past until now.
english.tutorQ: ហេតុអ្វីប្រើ ‘has lived’?
english.tutorA: ‘Since 2019’ marks a period continuing to now, so the present perfect is needed. 🎯

python.about: Python is the most popular first programming language in the world — and this course teaches it the Cambodian way, with every lesson explained in both Khmer and English. You'll start from absolute zero and build up to writing real programs with functions, data structures, and object-oriented code.
python.about2: Every module mixes short theory lessons with hands-on practice in the built-in code editor, plus graded challenges that earn you XP. Our AI mentor is beside you the whole way, ready to explain anything in the language you think in.
python.outcome1: Write and run real Python programs from your browser — no setup needed
python.outcome2: Master variables, strings, conditionals, loops, and functions
python.outcome3: Work with lists, dictionaries, and object-oriented basics
python.outcome4: Solve classic coding challenges like FizzBuzz and Palindrome

react.about: React powers the modern web — from Facebook to the apps Cambodian startups build every day. This course takes you from your first component to complete interactive applications with hooks, state, and real data fetching.
react.about2: You'll build real projects in every module: counters, todo lists, a weather app, and more. Theory lessons are short and visual, and the AI mentor answers your questions in Khmer or English whenever you're stuck.
react.outcome1: Build reusable components with JSX and props
react.outcome2: Manage interactivity with useState and event handling
react.outcome3: Fetch and display real data with useEffect
react.outcome4: Ship complete mini-apps: todo list, weather app, movie search

algorithms.about: Algorithms and data structures are what separate coders from engineers — and they're the key to passing technical interviews at any company. This course builds your problem-solving toolkit step by step, from Big-O analysis to trees and dynamic programming.
algorithms.about2: Each concept comes with visual explanations, practice drills in the code editor, and interview-style challenges. Explanations are available in Khmer and English, so the hard ideas actually stick.
algorithms.outcome1: Analyse code performance with Big-O notation
algorithms.outcome2: Implement classic searching and sorting algorithms
algorithms.outcome3: Use stacks, queues, and binary trees with confidence
algorithms.outcome4: Solve interview-style challenges and earn ranking XP

math.about: This course covers the complete Grade 12 mathematics curriculum — functions, limits, derivatives, integrals, and probability — fully aligned with the BacII national exam. Every concept is taught step by step in Khmer and English.
math.about2: You'll practise with exam-style exercises after every lesson, and the AI mentor can walk you through any solution — including past BacII questions — at your own pace.
math.outcome4: Practise with real BacII exam questions

physics.about: Grade 11 physics made visual and intuitive — forces, motion, energy, electricity, and waves, aligned with the national curriculum. Every hard idea is explained with everyday Cambodian examples.
physics.about2: Each lesson pairs clear explanations with interactive exercises, and the AI mentor answers your questions in Khmer or English whenever you're stuck.
physics.outcome1: Apply Newton's laws to real-world problems
physics.outcome4: Describe waves and their everyday applications

english.about: Build practical English step by step — vocabulary, grammar, listening, and conversation — from complete beginner to confident speaker. Designed for Khmer speakers, with explanations in your language.
english.about2: Lessons are short and interactive, with instant feedback on every exercise. The AI mentor explains grammar in Khmer so nothing gets lost in translation.
english.outcome2: Master core grammar from tenses to conditionals
english.outcome3: Grow a practical vocabulary for school and work
english.outcome4: Prepare for school exams and job interviews
